name: lango
description: Lango - French spaced repetition desktop app

scripts.postinstall: cd spaced-repetition && npm install && cd ../spaced-repetition-api && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "cd spaced-repetition && npm start" "cd spaced-repetition-api && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3001 && electron ."
scripts.dist: cd spaced-repetition-api && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder
